summary: Frontend testing complete for SepulangDinas SaaS platform. All 11 requested features tested and verified working correctly across desktop and mobile viewports.
passed_tests: Demo login user@demo.com/password redirects to /dashboard correctly
Demo login admin@demo.com/password redirects to /admin correctly
Mobile hamburger menu opens with all navigation items including separate Logout button
Modal 'Tambah Catatan Kegiatan' title displays correctly
Status Pasien radio group has all 3 options (Pasien Baru, Pasien Lama, Pasien Pulang)
Ketergantungan radio group has all 3 options (ADL Self Care, Partial Care, Total Care)
All 13 toggle switches for Tindakan Spesifik are present and functional
e-Kinerja page generates sub-points (22 sub-points from sample data)
e-Kinerja sub-points split by newline with individual copy buttons
e-Remunerasi page has two modes: Per Nilai and Per Tanggal
e-Remunerasi Per Nilai mode generates 5 points with copy buttons
e-Remunerasi Per Tanggal mode has month/year/point selectors with table view
Rekap Logbook shows spreadsheet-style table with all required columns
Rekap Logbook has Export CSV and Print buttons
Desktop sidebar navigation has all 7 menu items and works correctly
Mobile bottom navigation has 5 core menu items (Logbook, Remun, Kinerja, Rekap, Pasien)
Mobile bottom navigation items are clickable and navigate correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 requested frontend features are working correctly. Demo login redirects work, mobile hamburger menu with separate Logout button works, modal has all required fields including 13 toggles, e-Kinerja sub-point splitting works with 22 individual copy buttons, e-Remunerasi has two modes working, Rekap Logbook displays spreadsheet table, and both desktop sidebar and mobile bottom navigation work correctly.

mocked_apis_confirmed.Export PDF: MOCKED - shows toast 'Fitur akan segera hadir'
mocked_apis_confirmed.Export CSV: MOCKED - shows toast 'Fitur Export CSV akan segera hadir'

features_verified.mobile_hamburger_menu: PASS - all items including separate Logout button
features_verified.eremunerasi_modes: PASS - Per Nilai and Per Tanggal modes
features_verified.rekap_logbook_table: PASS - spreadsheet view with all columns
